# vendor/jasmine-json

Files taken from [`pulsar-edit/jasmine-json`](https://github.com/pulsar-edit/jasmine-json/).

Since the only file we care about is `lib/matchers.js` that is pulled in, as well as it's source CoffeeScript
to make it easier to accomplish any future decaf work that may occur.
Additionally, to that end it's `package.json` has been copied over to be able to see what kind of CoffeeScript tooling is being used.
